turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: are you vera ? i love library shopping . we aren't alone .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: crazy , my wife is vera . were you wondering what had become of her ?

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: yes ! i know how to be by myself . you ? i don't need new friends . you ?

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: you are never alone , and the law firm i work for knows it . we fight for you .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: hmmm . i prefer things the old fashioned way . you . tell me more about vera . please !

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: well , we have bought the house she grew up in , and she stays home with the kids .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: do not trust anyone ! is your vera nice ? ours is dead .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: i trust only you . my vera is nice . why is yours dead ?

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: you aren't the kids father . vera isn't nice . i'm at the library now . you ?

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: oh no ! but how can you be sure ? ! i'm under a bridge on 59th street .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: hide the knives ! tell them to leave me alone ! please . you aren't on 59th !

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: oh wait , they changed the sign ! we are working as hard as we can on your case .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: shhh . . . they can hear us . i do not need new friends !

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: well i despise tofu and have never found any friends in it try tofu , for security .
